title: Waveform Not Reflecting Virtual Interface Values Defined in Class

features.name: virtual_interface_in_class
features.description: Code should include a class with a virtual interface member declaration

features.name: class_method_assigns_to_virtual_interface_signal
features.description: Code should include a class method that assigns a value to a signal through a virtual interface reference

features.name: waveform_dump_with_class_virtual_interface
features.description: Code should include $dumpvars for waveform recording alongside a class instance with virtual interface

features.name: interface_with_input_output_signals
features.description: Code should include an interface definition with input and output signals
